authors.author: Lynn DeShazo
Lynn DeShazo
Herr, du bist mir teurer als Silber

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, You are more precious than silver. Lord, You are more costly than gold. Lord, You are more beautiful than diamonds, And nothing I desire compares to You.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Lord, Your Love is higher than mountains. Lord, Your Love is deeper than seas. Lord, Your Love encompasses the nations, And yet, You live right here inside of me!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Who can weigh the value of knowing You? Who can judge the worth of who You are? Who can count the blessings of loving You? Who can say just how great You are?
